posts.author: rconman (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using monday to build out a toilet rental and septic pumping management platform, and we have clients that require servicing on different schedules.

So I’m wondering if I can recur tasks based on the schedule that is inputted for that client?

Also just wondering if this business is suited for Monday.com, it’s kind of tough for me and I’m considering moving to a more tailored platform.
